"'''A Campaign Guide to the Centrality'''" is an eight-page article appearing in [[Star Wars Gamer 5|''Star Wars Gamer'' 5]]. It was written by [[Michael Kogge]] and illustrated by [[Adi Granov]].

==Media==
===Collected in===
*<!-- 2001-07-24 -->[[Star Wars Gamer 5|''Star Wars Gamer'' 5]]
